case_title: ROGER TURCIOS VS. S & H INDEPENDENT PREMIUM BRANDS WEST, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURCIOS, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT S & H INDEPENDENT PREMIUM BRANDS WEST, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURCIOS, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S & H INDEPENDENT PREMIUM BRANDS WEST, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $975.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
